description: Implement a database audit and customer loyalty system for the Sakila DVD rental database (host: localhost, user: ga, password: password123). The supporting tables have already been created. Create an AFTER UPDATE trigger named tr_customer_audit on sakila.customer that inserts records into sakila.customer_audit_log containing the customer_id, old email, new email, and change timestamp. Develop a stored procedure named sp_calculate_loyalty_tiers() that clears and repopulates the sakila.customer_loyalty table, categorizing customers into 'Bronze' (0–5 rentals), 'Silver' (6–20 rentals), and 'Gold' (21+ rentals) tiers based on total rental counts. Verify the trigger by updating five customer email addresses, execute the loyalty procedure, and export the sakila.customer_loyalty table to /home/ga/Documents/exports/customer_loyalty.csv.
